title: rubus progelii
intro: Rubus progelii, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus progelii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
